title: Tests operate on the app's real default database file
evidence: test_app.py:15 setUp calls init_db() and app writes to hard-coded DATABASE='books.db' (app.py:10); no temp/isolated DB, so a pre-existing books.db in the cwd collides with test state
suggestion: Parameterize the DB path (env var or app config) and point tests at a temp file

title: No type validation on year/isbn inputs
evidence: app.py:50-51 year/isbn taken via data.get() with no type or format check; a string year is stored as-is
suggestion: Coerce/validate year to int and isbn to a string pattern; return 400 on bad types

title: conn referenced in except before it is guaranteed assigned
evidence: app.py:73-78,163-168 — if get_db_connection() raised, 'conn' would be unbound in the except block (conn.close()), masking the real error with NameError
suggestion: Initialize conn=None before try and guard conn.close() with 'if conn'

title: ISBN uniqueness enforced and surfaced as 400
evidence: app.py:22 UNIQUE constraint + app.py:73-75 IntegrityError -> 400 'ISBN already exists'; beyond the spec's stated validation
